## Description

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- **Extension Version**: (from manifest.json)
- **Operating System**: (e.g., Windows 11, macOS 15)

Paste any relevant console logs here (F12 -> Console)
